intro: Desmodium sinoluteolum, also known as the tropical tick trefoil, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Bioactive constituents found in Desmodium sinoluteolum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
